sendemailaction.body:
Hi {nextapprover.altname},


You have a new Purchase Requisition to approve. Please log in to Portal to approve and review this transaction - {tranId}.

- Subsidiary: {subsidiary}

- Memo: {memo}

- Date: {trandate}

- Posting Period: {postingperiod}

- Department: {department}

Thank you!
sendemailaction.subject: Purchase requisition {tranId} is pending approval

initcondition.formula: "User Role" NOT IN ("Role1") OR "User" NOT IN ("Next Approver")

sendemailaction.body:
Hi {nextapprover.altname},


You have a new Purchase Requisition to approve. Please log in to Portal to approve and review this transaction - {tranId}.

- Subsidiary: {subsidiary}

- Memo: {memo}

- Date: {trandate}

- Posting Period: {postingperiod}

- Department: {department}

Thank you!
sendemailaction.subject: Purchase requisition {tranId} is pending approval

initcondition.formula: "User Role" NOT IN ("Role1") OR "User" NOT IN ("Next Approver")

sendemailaction.body:
Hi {custbody_created_by.altname},
 

Your purchase requisition {tranId} has been approved.

 

- Subsidiary: {subsidiary}

- Memo: {memo}

- Posting Date: {trandate}

- Department: {department}

 

Thank you!
sendemailaction.subject: Purchase requisition {tranId} has been approved.

sendemailaction.body:
Hi {custbody_created_by.altname},

Your Purchase Requisition {tranId} has been rejected.

Please log in to Portal to review this transaction.

- Subsidiary: {subsidiary}

- Memo: {memo}

- Date: {trandate}

- Rejection Reason: 


Thank you!
sendemailaction.subject: Purchase Requisition {tranId} Rejected.

initcondition.formula: "User" NOT IN ("Created By") OR "User Role" NOT IN ("Role1")

sendemailaction.body:
Hi {custbody_created_by.altname},

Your Purchase Requisition {tranId} has been rejected.

Please log in to Portal to review this transaction.

- Subsidiary: {subsidiary}

- Memo: {memo}

- Date: {trandate}

- Rejection Reason: 


Thank you!
sendemailaction.subject: Purchase Requisition {tranId} Rejected.

initcondition.formula: "User Role" NOT IN ("Role1") OR "User" NOT IN ("Created By")
